Change Your Price List’s Look & Feel With Multiple Layouts

Yup, you’ve read right! The Price List module of the Divi Plus plugin comes with multiple layouts to bring diversity in each price list you create. It includes 2 layouts, one to create a price list in a horizontal formation having pricing side by side. And another to create a price list having information and pricing below the thumbnail. The below demo achieved using Divi Plus Price List and Separator module.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.5.8" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.5.8" _module_preset="default"][et_pb_text admin_label="Change Your Price List’s Look & Feel With Multiple Layouts" _builder_version="4.5.8" header_2_font="Poppins||||||||" header_2_font_size="40px" header_2_line_height="1.3em" header_3_font="Poppins|700|||||||" header_3_font_size="26px" text_orientation="center" module_alignment="center" locked="off"]
